hero.name: Nicolás Rozas
hero.subtitle: Fullstack Developer · Argentina
hero.about: Web, mobile and automation development with 5+ years of experience. I've worked on products used by millions of people at companies in Argentina, the UK and the United States.

entries.description: Custom websites and web apps. E-commerce (Question Colors), AI bots, WhatsApp chatbots, automation systems with n8n and GPT.

Argentine software factory with international clients. Fullstack across Angular, React, Gatsby and Strapi. Products: Seesaw (K-12 portfolios), Life Homecare (home health), Pathful (K-16 career guidance).
FinTech startup. Wakeful: LATAM investment platform for US markets via Interactive Brokers. Bitennial: crypto trading mobile app.
UK software factory. E-commerce and nonprofit platforms (Make-A-Wish). React, Node.js, payment and donor integration.
